# Dimensional Researchers II

_"Discover and explore worlds that human mind was not meant to see..."_
## Description

Welcome to **Dimensional Researchers II**, a WORK-IN-PROGRESS modpack that’s all about exploring dangerous dimensions and documenting your findings. With 180+ Mods, this modpack offers a unique, horror-themed experience designed to keep players on their toes.

[Please note that this modpack is currently VERY unstable and may experience unexpected and unexplainable crashes or lags!!]

The modpack revolves around exploring these dimensions and documenting your findings via Questing or Patchouli (not fully implemented in 0.4.7). Modpack's theme aims to scare the player, either through the unknown nature of the dimensions you may end up in or the entities that inhabit the overworld...


## Mods

Our modpack features a variety of mods, categorized into groups. (This is not a full modlist)

<details>
<summary>Mod Categories</summary>



<details>
<summary>Tools of Research Mods</summary>

### Tools of Research Mods

- Ad Astra - Adds helpful machinery and energy sources
- Adventures in Time - Adds an expensive dimensional-ship (TARDIS) that can travel between any dimensions if maintained properly.
- Create - Adds helpful machinery allowing for automation certain processes.
- Exposure - Adds a Photo Camera that can capture any of your findings!
- Fabric Waystones - A costful way of  Fast-Travel between distances and dimensions. 
- Tempad - Adds an expensive tool allows you to travel between any previous set locations or discovered waystones.
- Spelunkery - Enrichment of caving experience _(a lot)_
- Antique Atlas 4 - Adds a world map that you need to discover for yourself!
- Sophisticated Backpacks - Adds upgradable backpacks


</details>



<details>
<summary>Dimension Mods</summary>

### Dimension Mods

- Universe 76 - "Enter Universe 76, the 76th world in Minecraft version 1.8. It was deleted. It was corrupted."
- The Long Story - "Explore "The Simulation" Dimension and upgrade your equipment to fight the bosses!"
- Mine Cells - "5 new dimension-dungeons, two of which house new bosses"
- Ad Astra! - Space explorations
- Dimensional Doors - "adds doors that allow access to teleportation and extra-dimensional pocket dungeons."
- Deeper Dark - "A New Sculk-Filled Dimension for You to Explore."
- Fabric Backrooms Plus - "It's possible to escape from Backrooms, isn't it?"
- Axon T.E.C.H.N.O.L.O.G.I.E.S. - "adds new ores, armor with their own tool types, status effects, mobs, dimensions, and more."

</details>




<details>
<summary>Impediments</summary>

### Impediments

- Weeping Angels - "Don't Blink!"
- From The Fog - "You can't see him, but I promise he can see you..."
- Cave Dweller Evolved - "God help you if you hear his scream."
- Mutant Creatures - "The mutants are back! Face scary creatures and powerful beasts like never before."
- Dark Waters - "There is something hidden in the storms and it approaches..."
- Manic - "Sacrifice your sanity to the dark arts"
- Photosyntesis - "It's all about the crops, seasons and the world of food!"

</details>




<details>
<summary>Quality-of-life Mods</summary>

### Quality-of-life Mods

- AstroCraft - Adds real life stars and planets.
- Better Clouds.
- Carry On - Allows for transporting chests and all the other blocks.
- Eating Animation.
- Randomium Ore - Adds new rare ore that can drop anything!

</details>



</details>



## The Performance Issue
Once again this modpack is VERY unstable. i have no idea how to make a modpack more stable except for downloading performance mods... if you know how and are willing to help Dimensional Researchers II to become a more stable modpack! DM me on discord `tacticalistic`
